TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mohamed_Ould_Ghazouani, title = Mohamed_Ould_Ghazouani, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mohamed_Ould_Ghazouani} }

S.FORM: Mohamed Ould Ghazouani Mohamed Ould Ghazouani (ryax sa 4 na byacing tay 12 squ kawas na 1956 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Mauritania ta' misuw hya' ga Mohamed Ould Ghazouani, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Mohamed Ould Ghazouani minkahul sa Boumdeid, Assaba Region na Mauritania. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1956 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun

Mohamed Ould Ghazouani Mohamed Ould Ghazouani (ryax sa 4 na byacing tay 12 squ kawas na 1956 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Mauritania ta' misuw hya' ga Mohamed Ould Ghazouani, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Mohamed Ould Ghazouani minkahul sa Boumdeid, Assaba Region na Mauritania. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1956 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: moħame* oul* ɣħazouani moħame* oul* ɣħazouani (rjax s~ɕa * na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - mis~ɕuw ), ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq na pklaħaŋ ɣaɣa. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw mauritania taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa moħame* oul* ɣħazouani, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral moħame* oul* ɣħazouani minkaħul s~ɕa βoum*ei*, as~ɕs~ɕaβa reɣion na mauritania. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
